description_long: This object is a classic lever-action shotgun with a long, cylindrical black barrel and a metallic gold receiver. The stock is made of wood with a dark brown finish and features angular black inlays for added grip and style. The receiver is robust and metallic, with a prominent lever loop beneath it, characteristic of lever-action firearms. The trigger guard is elongated and smoothly rounded, integrated with the lever mechanism. The overall design is streamlined, with no visible ribbing or venting on the barrel, and the stock is a traditional full stock. The shotgun's construction suggests durability and a blend of wood and metal materials, typical of historical or replica firearms.
description: A lever-action shotgun with a long black barrel, gold metallic receiver, and a brown wooden full stock with black inlays.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the gold receiver, brown stock with black inlays, and the long black barrel.
description_view_1: Barrel-end view showing the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun, with the gold receiver and brown stock visible in alignment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, displaying the gold receiver, brown stock, and long black barrel from the other side.
description_view_3: Stock-end view showing the flat end of the brown wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long cylindrical barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, smoothly rounded trigger guard integrated with the lever, no finger grooves or reinforcement
